recommendations.title: Counter Investigation
recommendations.overview: A cop investigates whether the man convicted of murdering his daughter is really guilty.

recommendations.title: A Page of Madness
recommendations.overview: A man takes a job at an asylum with hopes of freeing his imprisoned wife.

recommendations.title: If Beale Street Could Talk
recommendations.overview: After her fiance is falsely imprisoned, a pregnant African-American woman sets out to clear his name and prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Appendage
recommendations.overview: After hitting a breaking point, Hannah's inner thoughts physicalize into a monstrous creature that threatens to upend her life.

recommendations.title: 12 Angry Men

recommendations.title: Mother
recommendations.overview: A pregnant woman, who is taking care of her son with development problems, is at her breaking point when a caregiver from the Philippines steps into her life. Diana suspects that she’s using voodoo against her after the quick improvements of her son.

recommendations.title: 3 Generations
recommendations.overview: A teenager transitions from female to male, and his family must come to terms with that fact.
